# pcx-ai-toolkit

AI-powered Rust toolkit for Perception.cx Enma scripting.

Repository: https://github.com/VoidChecksum/pcx-ai-toolkit
License: MIT

## Start Here
- [AI Agent Operating Manual](https://github.com/VoidChecksum/pcx-ai-toolkit/raw/main/docs/AI_AGENT_OPERATING_MANUAL.md)
- [Perception LLM Routing](https://github.com/VoidChecksum/pcx-ai-toolkit/raw/main/docs/perception/llm-routing.md)
- [Enma language reference](https://github.com/VoidChecksum/pcx-ai-toolkit/raw/main/docs/enma/llms-language.md)
- [Perception Enma overview](https://github.com/VoidChecksum/pcx-ai-toolkit/raw/main/docs/perception/readme.md)

## Core Data
- [API index](https://github.com/VoidChecksum/pcx-ai-toolkit/raw/main/knowledge/pcx-api-index.json)
- [Unsupported symbols](https://github.com/VoidChecksum/pcx-ai-toolkit/raw/main/knowledge/unsupported-symbols.json)
- [Counts](https://github.com/VoidChecksum/pcx-ai-toolkit/raw/main/docs/COUNTS.json)
- [Provenance](https://github.com/VoidChecksum/pcx-ai-toolkit/raw/main/docs/PROVENANCE.json)

## Rust CLI
Build with:
```bash
cargo build --release --manifest-path tools/pe-parser/Cargo.toml
```

Primary commands:
- `pcx-rs api <symbol> [--json]`
- `pcx-rs symbol-check <path> [--json]`
- `pcx-rs verify-project <path> [--json] [--allow-placeholders] [--allow-unverified]`
- `pcx-rs check-answer <answer.md> [--json]`
- `pcx-rs mcp`
- `pcx-rs mcp-schema --json`
- `pcx-rs counts --json`
- `pcx-rs build-provenance --json`
- `pcx-rs check-drift --json`

## Native RE Tools
- `tools/bin/pe-parser`
- `tools/bin/api-lookup`
- `tools/bin/pattern-format-converter`
- `tools/bin/sig-uniqueness-checker`
- `tools/bin/binary-diff-summary`
- `tools/bin/offset-diff`
- `tools/bin/anti-debug-scanner`
- `tools/bin/identify-protector`
- `tools/bin/pe-section-analyzer`
- `tools/bin/analyze-vmprotect`
- `tools/bin/dump-strings-xor`
- `tools/bin/module-export-mapper`
